validation_summary.post_edit_pass_rate: 100% (4/4 validation tasks passed on documentation coverage)

edits.what: Added goals block with 6 subcommands (list, get, create, update, delete, set-metric)
edits.rationale: Entire resource block was missing from skill despite CLI support

edits.what: Added custom-fields and attachments resource blocks (6 subcommands total)
edits.rationale: Both resources mentioned in description but had zero CLI commands documented

edits.location: Quick Reference, teams and portfolios blocks
edits.what: Fixed teams list and portfolios list to document required flags
edits.rationale: Both flags are argparse-required but were undocumented, causing command failures

edits.location: Quick Reference, tasks, sections, and tags blocks

tool_bugs_discovered: CLI custom-fields list uses wrong API route: GET /custom_fields?workspace=... should be GET /workspaces/{gid}/custom_fields. Fix in cmd_custom_fields at line 373.
findings: goals list API returned 402 - workspace needs premium Asana tier. Skill docs correct.
custom-fields list 404 is CLI tool bug, not skill documentation error.
